name: prompt-optimizer
description: Prompt optimization patterns to reduce token usage while keeping output quality.

interface.shortDescription: Lower token usage without losing intent
interface.longDescription: Provides practical prompt compression workflows for Codex: concise constraints, reusable context blocks, and output caps to reduce total token spend.
defaultPrompt: Use prompt-optimizer to rewrite this request for 30% lower token usage while preserving meaning.
Compress this task prompt into a reusable template with variables and strict output limits.
Turn this long context into a compact summary plus a minimal follow-up prompt.
